evals.prompt: Apple Developer ForumsでCore Hapticsまわりの実装トラブルを調べて、iOSゲームでhapticを入れる時の注意点をまとめて
evals.expected_output: Uses Apple Developer Forums tag RSS, reports Core Haptics risk signals, cross-checks official docs, and recommends capability checks/fallbacks.

evals.prompt: developer.apple.com/forums から SpriteKit の最近のパフォーマンス問題を拾って、SwiftUI overlay と一緒に使う時のリスクを知りたい
evals.expected_output: Uses SpriteKit tag RSS, extracts performance/regression forum signals, preserves OS/device details, and distinguishes forum anecdotes from canonical guidance.

evals.prompt: AppDeveloper ForumでStoreKit 2の課金テスト周りの既知のつまずきを調べて。公式docsだけじゃなくフォーラムの実例が欲しい
evals.expected_output: Recognizes AppDeveloper Forum as Apple Developer Forums, checks StoreKit-related RSS/tag sources, summarizes forum evidence with links and caveats.
